base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of font_palette_red — a ui (hud_readout) from 1980 pac man. Red-tinted font variant — used for 'HIGH SCORE' header and score digits on top HUD. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Red-tinted font variant — used for 'HIGH SCORE' header and score digits on top HUD
